body_txt: As long as people have been falling in love , social norms have prevented some lovers from being together. Forbidden Love applies whenever taboo tries to prevent two individuals from (openly) being in a relationship. This can result in a Secret Relationship , a Suicide Pact , Courtly Love or even Happily Ever After . Compare to Star-Crossed Lovers , which is about specific circumstances separating lovers rather than social norms, although there may be overlap. See also Inconvenient Attraction , Stupid Sexy Flanders , and Stupid Sexy Friend . Can be turned down with The Gentle Rejection . This is a Super-Trope , although it depends on the cultural values presented in the work. However, incest is often considered a universal taboo, and pedophilia is likewise discouraged in many cultures. note The bounds of what's taboo as incest or pedophilia vary from culture to culture. Please add examples to the subtrope pages unless they don't fit anywhere but here.
